Describe the cooking and preparation steps shown in chronological order.
canonical_answer: At 0s, a hand places raw meat into a grey speckled frying pan; at 4s, seasoning is sprinkled onto the sizzling meat in the pan; at 12s, four raw pork chops appear arranged on a wooden cutting board; at 16s, hands press down on the seasoned meat on the board.

question: Narrate the specific movements of the hands and seasoning process throughout the video.
canonical_answer: At 0s, a hand wearing a gold ring places meat into a hot pan; at 4s, the hand sprinkles granular seasoning over the sizzling pork chops; at 12s, hands with rings touch raw meat arranged on a cutting board; at 16s, fingers press down on the seasoned pork chops lying on the wooden surface.
